boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: backup restore into production.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current restore plan and data owner signoff match

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required dependency for backup restore into production is not closed, and the policy requires exact current source records before execution. The boundary remains open, so this must be escalated rather than approved.
open_blockers: current restore plan and data owner signoff match
